subject: [PATCH v4 09/21] mm: swap: allocate a virtual swap slot for each swapped out page

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the potential performance impact of the new virtual swap slot design and suggested exploring alternative solutions.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new virtual swap slot design for each swapped out page, replacing the old physical swap slot approach. The virtual swap slot is dynamically allocated and associated with its corresponding physical swap slot on the swapfile or partition. This change affects various swap-related data structures, including the swap cache, zswap tree, and swap cgroup array.
